untranslatable_reason: This signal requires calculation and scaling of systematic factor exposures (Market, SMB, HML, Momentum, RMW, CMA) by inverse realized variance. The allowed indicator set contains only price-based technical indicators (RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, etc.) and does not include: (1) factor returns/exposures, (2) realized variance calculations, (3) factor scaling mechanics, or (4) multi-factor portfolio construction. This is a factor model rule requiring Fama-French factor data and portfolio-level transformations, not a price-action entry/exit rule. It cannot be expressed using the available technical indicators.
translation_notes: Signal SSRN_2659431_42 is a volatility-adjusted factor exposure scaling rule designed for multi-factor systematic portfolios. It operates at the factor level (rescaling SMB, HML, Momentum, RMW, CMA exposures monthly based on prior-month realized variance), not at the price level. To implement this signal correctly requires: access to historical factor returns, monthly realized variance computation, and dynamic weighting of factor exposures—none of which are supported by the price-based technical indicator library provided.
